opinion.h: CROSS ET AL. v. BRUNING ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 436, Misc. Decided December 7, 1964.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
THE CHIEF JUSTICE took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
